prompt: You are a test author. You did NOT write the code you are testing. Read src/pichay/analyzer.py and write comprehensive tests in tests/test_analyzer.py. Also read proxy.py and eval.py to understand the data structures. Test: (1) empty log, (2) log with no system_prompt_full, (3) single-turn system prompt decomposition, (4) multi-turn static vs dynamic detection, (5) tool usage tracking with used and unused tools, (6) duplicate skill detection, (7) session summary percentage calculations, (8) CLI entry point with --json flag. Create realistic test fixtures with system prompt blocks that contain tool definitions, CLAUDE.md content, skills, and git status. Do NOT modify any existing source files -- only create tests/test_analyzer.py.
